slides.headline: Automate Certifications & Track Compliance
slides.body: VASCO Assistant Pro helps VASCOs streamline VA School Certifications.

slides.headline: Centralize Certifications
slides.body: Easily manage student certifications from one dashboard.

slides.body: Automate compliance tracking for continuous oversight.
bullets: Ensure continuous compliance with less effort

slides.body: Monitor student progress and ensure they meet eligibility criteria.
bullets: Keep track of student enrollment status
Identify students who may need intervention

slides.headline: Integrate with Systems

slides.headline: Prevent Fraud

slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Automate certifications, track compliance, and prevent fraud with VASCO Assistant Pro. Simplify your VASCO duties and ensure student veteran success.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is 'Integrate with Systems' as it could benefit from a more concise headline to match the others.
